results.title: Welcome to Logistics Management
results.description: June 1, 2026 · As market conditions level out, leading 3PLs double down on automation, orchestration, and strategic partnerships to meet growing shipper demands.

results.title: CosmoFarm Delivers Record Q2 2026 Revenue of Over $15M, Representing $60+ Million Annualized Run-Rate; Adds Over 80 Pharmacies and Expands AI Automation and Facility Capacity
results.description: CosmoFarm added more than 80 new pharmacies to its distribution network during the period, continuing the strong customer growth that has made it one of the leading pharmaceutical wholesalers in the greater Athens area. To support this accelerating growth, Cosmos Health is increasing capital expenditure at CosmoFarm, investing in new robotic automation ...

results.title: Fini Strengthens UK Wholesale Distribution Network | Asian Trader
results.description: To support the launch, Fini has invested in impactful wholesale activation, including a front-of-depot feature with Bestway to maximise retailer visibility and drive awareness of the newly listed range.

results.title: TRISTAN - Overview, News & Similar companies | ZoomInfo.com
results.description: With a history spanning nearly five decades, TRISTAN has built a robust operational framework and market presence. Its primary focus is on delivering quality apparel through both direct-to-consumer channels and potentially through wholesale or promotional item distribution, as indicated by its product categories.

results.title: Supply Chain, Logistics, and Trucking Media and News - FreightWaves
